title: Implement quiescence search
description: Extend leaf evaluation with capture-focused search to reduce horizon artifacts.
acceptance: Quiescence search is called from the baseline search frontier
Basic capture sequences are resolved more stably

title: Implement basic move ordering heuristics
description: Improve alpha-beta effectiveness by searching better candidate moves earlier.
acceptance: Captures and obvious strong moves are prioritized
Search node count improves on benchmark positions

title: Implement killer moves and history heuristic
description: Add lightweight heuristic state to improve move ordering in deeper searches.
acceptance: Killer move storage is integrated safely
History scores influence ordering without breaking correctness

title: Implement a transposition table
description: Cache previously searched positions to reduce duplicated work.
acceptance: Table lookups and writes are integrated into search
Stored entries do not produce illegal or inconsistent behavior

title: Add repetition and fifty-move draw handling
description: Score repeated and rule-based draw states correctly in search.

title: Add node counting and benchmarking support
description: Measure search performance and compare changes across checkpoints.
acceptance: Engine reports node counts or benchmark output
A repeatable benchmark command is documented

title: Add search regression suite and no-regression gates
description: Ensure strength work does not silently break legality or tactical correctness.
acceptance: Perft suite reruns remain part of verification
Search regressions are detectable through one command

title: Add basic time management for UCI go commands
description: Handle simple search budgeting so the engine is less awkward in GUIs.
acceptance: go movetime works or an equivalent simple time control is supported
Engine stops predictably within the requested budget
